hooks.command:
git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (COUNT=$(git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l | tr -d ' '); FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '
' ' ' | sed 's/ $//'); if [ "$COUNT" -le 3 ]; then MSG="auto: edit $FILES"; else FIRST=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -2 | paste -sd ', '); MSG="auto: edit $COUNT files ($FIRST, ...)"; fi; git commit -m "$MSG" 2>/dev/null || true)
